final:
module SRAM_Cell (
    input wire [3:0] D,
    input wire WE,
    input wire RE,
    input wire CLK,
    output reg [3:0] Q
);
    reg [3:0] cell_data;

    always @(posedge CLK) begin
        if (WE) begin
            cell_data <= D; // Write data to cell_data
        end
        if (RE) begin
            Q <= cell_data; // Read data from cell_data
        end
    end
endmodule
